title: "Not sure if I will live": Candace Owens drops chilling texts as Charlie Kirk feared for his life before death
summary_full: Candace Owens shared alleged messages from Charlie Kirk claiming he feared for his life before his death. In the texts, Kirk spoke about being “wiped out” and said, “Anyway, I am not sure if I will live to see the end of this revolution.” Owens expressed regret for dismissing his concerns and hinted at a possible cover-up, though she provided no verified evidence to support the claim.
